remadeTemplate.summary: Fund administration fees, donor disclosure, calculation basis, extraordinary costs, and transaction fees.

sections.heading: Fee Approval
paragraphs: Cost recovery or administration fees charged to funds must be recommended by the finance committee or treasurer and approved by the board.

sections.heading: Disclosure and Calculation
bullets: Fee provisions are included in fund agreements or donor communications where applicable.
Donors are informed of the current fee and any material changes.
Fees are calculated using the board-approved basis, such as fund capital and undistributed earnings at a specified date.

sections.heading: Extraordinary Costs
paragraphs: Extraordinary costs and electronic transaction fees may be charged to the applicable fund if permitted by the board-approved fee schedule and donor documentation.

remadeTemplate.html:
{PolicyName}

Organization: {CorporationName}

Policy number: {PolicyNumber}

Effective date: {PolicyEffectiveDate}

This is a Societyer starter template remade from imported source material. Review it for your jurisdiction, bylaws, funder requirements, charity status, and actual operations before adoption.

Fee Approval

Cost recovery or administration fees charged to funds must be recommended by the finance committee or treasurer and approved by the board.

Disclosure and Calculation

  • Fee provisions are included in fund agreements or donor communications where applicable.
  • Donors are informed of the current fee and any material changes.
  • Fees are calculated using the board-approved basis, such as fund capital and undistributed earnings at a specified date.

Extraordinary Costs

Extraordinary costs and electronic transaction fees may be charged to the applicable fund if permitted by the board-approved fee schedule and donor documentation.

Monitoring

This policy will be reviewed on or around {ReviewDate} and whenever legal, operational, funding, or governance requirements materially change.

Board Acceptance

This policy was approved by resolution of the board of directors of {CorporationName} on {EffectiveDate}.

{#SoleVotDir}Approved by the sole voting director.{/SoleVotDir}{#MultiVotDir}Approved by counterpart signatures of the voting directors.{/MultiVotDir}

{#VotingDirectors}{SignerTag}
